case_title: PAT NG et al VS. DONNIE STEVE STEVENS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND PRE JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, PAT NG, SAM SERVED NOV-18-2010, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NG, PAT NG, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, PAT NG, SAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: THE REMAINING 3 COMMERCIALLY LEASED PARKING SPACES LOCATED AT 801-25TH AVE., SAN FRANCISCO AND, THE 3 REMAINING PARKING SPACES AT 2411-23RD AVE. SAN FRANCISCO **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF NG, PAT NG, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENS, DONNIE STEVE
